title: Lifesteal Plugin
description: A lifesteal plugin for your server with everything you might need! This includes the lifesteal base, and some QoL commands for the plugin for admins.
body:
This project is a lifesteal plugin for your minecraft server. It adds functionality for lifesteal on the server. When one player kills another, one of the victim's hearts is transferred to the killer. When one person is below 1 heart, they will be banned, until an opped player revives them using the `/revive` comamnd. Hearts can be crafted and the entire plugin can be controlled using the built in commands as an opped player. You can learn more about these commands with `/help`. Players can craft hearts using this 4 netherite ingots, 2 gold blocks, 2 diamond blocks, and a nether star. This is the diagram:
```
N D N
G S G
N D N
```
Players can withdraw hearts from their health bar using `/withdrawheart` and convert it into an item.

You might want to download this plugin if you are looking for an extra factor to spice up your server with some friends, or at least make it a little harder to get max gear and all. Or, if you really enjoy lifesteal videos on youtube, and wanna try it for yourself, that's cool too! That's where the inspiration for this plugin came from, and because I had trouble using other ones for the version I wanted and features. So if you want the features I've mentioned, you can try this plugin out.

If you have any issues with the plugin, please let me know via my discord which is linked in my profile. To reset the plugin use `/lifestealreset`. It will ask you to confirm by typing `/lifestealresetconfirm`. Please note that this command is only avalible for opped players or players with the `lifesteal.admin` permisssion.
